paper.title: Optimum mix design of enhanced permeable concrete - An experimental investigation

evidence.evidence_text: Optimal mixes B2/B4/B5/B6/B7 report w/c, sand or fine aggregate, SF, SP, density, 7-day and 28-day compressive strength, porosity, permeability.
Unconfined compressive strengths were tested according to AS1012.9-1999; results are average values.
